hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to presence of specific symptoms like rash and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to absence of symptoms like chills and rigors
